results.validation_notes: Deep context confirms the existing classification. Microservices evidenced by multiple Dockerfiles (pachd, pachctl, worker) and Kubernetes/Helm deployment (etc/helm/pachyderm/, Makefile launch commands using kubectl/helm). Event-Driven evidenced by RabbitMQ integration (Dockerfile.go-rabbitmq-spout) and 'data-driven pipelines automatically trigger based on detecting data changes' feature. Pipe-and-Filter evidenced by the pipeline system architecture with 'multi-stage' processing and DAG-based data transformations described in README and supported by src/ Go implementation.
